notes: Neuromuscular activation session: 5 min easy walk + 10 goblet squats (light) + 5 wall balls (if shoulder pain-free) + 200m ski erg easy (if shoulder pain-free, else assault bike) + 200m row easy + 5 half-speed burpees + 5 min cool-down walk. Stop immediately if anything feels heavy, sluggish, or painful. Prioritise 8+ hours sleep tonight and carb-load 6–8g/kg. Review race-day pacing targets.
